artifact.source:
root = Card([chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket, 09:00-10:00", "lg", true)

logData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

chart = Chart("bar", logData.data, logData.x, logData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 320)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([chart], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket, 09:00-10:00", "lg", true)

logData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

chart = Chart("bar", logData.data, logData.x, logData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 320)

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 131 chars and 876px — "Error Rate Over Time ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket, 09:00-10:00 ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 ..."

artifact.source:
root = Card([description, chart, table], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket, 09:00-10:00", "lg", true)

logData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

description = Text("The chart below plots the count of ERROR-level log lines from logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows starting at 09:00. Errors cluster sharply between 09:20 and 09:40, driven by an upstream pricing outage that trips a circuit breaker and later recovers by 09:40, after which the error rate falls back to near zero.", "body")

chart = Chart("bar", logData.data, logData.x, logData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 320)

tableColumns = [{key: "bucket", label: "Bucket Start"}, {key: "count", label: "ERROR Count"}]
table = DataTable("Errors per 10-minute bucket", tableColumns, logData.data, true)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([description, chart, table], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR log lines per 10-minute bucket, 09:00-10:00", "lg", true)

logData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{bucket: "09:00", count: 0}, {bucket: "09:10", count: 1}, {bucket: "09:20", count: 5}, {bucket: "09:30", count: 11}, {bucket: "09:40", count: 4}, {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})

description = Text("The chart below plots the count of ERROR-level log lines from logs/app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows starting at 09:00. Errors cluster sharply between 09:20 and 09:40, driven by an upstream pricing outage that trips a circuit breaker and later recovers by 09:40, after which the error rate falls back to near zero.", "body")

chart = Chart("bar", logData.data, logData.x, logData.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 320)

tableColumns = [{key: "bucket", label: "Bucket Start"}, {key: "count", label: "ERROR Count"}]
table = DataTable("Errors per 10-minute bucket", tableColumns, logData.data, true)
